raw_products.bookDescription:
Relax, Focus, and Have Fun with Easy-to-Medium Crosswords!
Enjoy the perfect mix of fun and challenge with 100 well-crafted crossword puzzles designed to keep your brain sharp and your eyes comfortable. Printed in a large 8.5x11 inch format with big, clear text, this book offers hours of enjoyable, stress-free entertainment. Whether you’re a casual solver or an experienced puzzler, this collection is ideal for maintaining mental sharpness while having fun. It’s also a thoughtful gift for adults and a relaxing gift for seniors who love keeping their minds active.

Every puzzle is carefully crafted by professional constructors to be easy-to-medium difficulty—engaging enough to keep your mind active but never frustrating. It’s an enjoyable way to exercise your brain while revisiting the shows that defined a generation.Why It’s the Perfect Gift for TV Lovers:
A thoughtful, nostalgic present that sparks happy memories and conversation.

Packed with 50 themed crosswords celebrating beloved TV shows, famous stars, and iconic moments, it’s the perfect mix of nostalgia, fun, and brain-boosting challenge.

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: When grandpa came to visit I bought him this crossword puzzle book. It kept him busy during the down time for 2 weeks. He loves doing crosswords and he loved this book.His only negative comment was, they use the word “Alto” for a male singing voice multiple times throughout. Everyone knows Altos are always female.

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Nostalgic TV Fun with a Clean, Classic Presentation
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: This is a beautifully themed crossword collection that truly captures the spirit of classic television. The nostalgic focus on beloved shows and cultural moments from the golden age of TV makes it both entertaining and engaging.The layout is clean and easy to follow, and the large print format makes solving comfortable without feeling oversized or cluttered. The puzzles strike a nice balance between accessible and thoughtfully challenging, which keeps the experience enjoyable without becoming frustrating.I especially appreciated how immersive the themes feel — it’s not just a set of random clues, but a curated walk through memorable eras of television. The presentation is polished, and the solutions are clearly organized at the back for easy reference.Overall, this is a well-produced crossword book that delivers exactly what it promises: relaxing, nostalgic entertainment with a clean and readable design. A great choice for fans of classic TV and puzzle lovers alike.

raw_products.title: Large Print Crosswords #1
raw_products.inStockText: This title will be released on December 29, 2026.
raw_products.author: Thomas Joseph
raw_products.breadCrumbs: Books > Humor & Entertainment > Puzzles & Games > Crosswords
raw_products.bookDescription: Challenge your brain—not your eyes with large-print crosswords for adults! Large word type, generously sized grids, easy-to-see numbers in the boxes, and 125 crosswords in every book. No wonder the volumes in this Large Print Crosswords series from beloved puzzle book imprint Puzzlewright Press have the seal of approval from the NAVH (National Association of Visually Handicapped).  The crosswords in Large Print Crosswords #1 are challenging for the brain, but not hard on the eyes, so everyone can enjoy some puzzle fun. Crosswords can keep the mind sharp, but if your sight has weakened through the years, of if you're vision-impaired, you might have to strain to read both the words of the clues and the numbers in the boxes. That can be frustrating and cause even the most determined puzzlers to put down the crossword. Not anymore, because every one of these large-print puzzles, 125 crosswords in each collection, takes two pages, so they're easy to see and to fill out. And these cunning puzzles will really please, covering a variety of subjects and offering a real test of your word smarts.

aiReviewsSummary.text: Customers find this crossword puzzle book challenging but not impossible, with nice large print that's easy to read, particularly for seniors with vision issues. The book keeps minds sharp and provides many hours of enjoyment, making it a great gift option. While customers like the clues and puzzles, some find them few in number, and opinions about clue difficulty are mixed.

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Perfect in MANY Ways for a senior puzzler.
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: My mother has been an avid crossword puzzle fan all her life.  Now 92, she enjoys doing them constantly, but obviously the NYT Sunday puzzle is no longer realistic ! This book combines several features that make them a perfect fit.  First of all, the Font size is really LARGE - on both the wording of the clues, AND the numbers in the grid.  This can really make a difference in avoiding strain to find the clues and matching boxes.  (Others I ordered recently have large grids, but small font clues - or vice versa)  It also enables me to sit beside her and still easily read the clues too. Second - The format with one page of clues, and the facing page with the grid,  easily stays open with a spiral binding.  Third,  the clues are not too "riddled" - most are pretty straightforward which is helpful for those losing the ability to follow clever, circuitous reasoning.  Fourth, the answers are fairly recognizable, relatively short words which  avoids spelling errors (as memory fades).  Lastly, the focus of clues and answers seems age appropriate - there are references to famous celebs or events of former decades and relatively few on current trendsetters.  If there is any negative, it is that the skill level is definitely Easy.  However,  even though she may be able to whip through these quickly, I don't think it's a problem, and she seems to find them a perfect blend of mental exercise and relaxation.  I will definitely plan to buy the rest in the series !
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on March 13, 2013

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: My grandmother is 94 years old and her eye's are starting to go. She loves doing puzzles and crosswords in the local newspaper, but she can no longer see the small text without a magnifying glass. She loves these large print crossword puzzles and says they vary in difficulty. I suspect that these large print crossword books are mostly used by older generations, but occasionally my grandmother calls to ask questions like "Who is the grandfather in the Simpsons?" or "Who wrote the Harry Potter series?"The book itself is a paperback with a ring binder. The questions and puzzle are on different pages, next to each other, which provides enough space for the large print. The book is a bit bulky and has some weight to it, but it's overall design is good. There's alo a answer section in the back..Pros:NAVH (National Association of Visually Handicapped) approved.Large TextAnswers are includedCons:Answer section is not in any logical order which makes it hard to find answers to a particular puzzle. I suspect this may be to deter cheaters, but if you look long enough you will find them.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on January 4, 2016

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Tommie Joe Large Print Crossword Puzzle book
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: great tommie joe book.  easy to read
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on February 28, 2024

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: For the most part, mainstream crossword puzzles can be frustrating, with clues and words really "stretching it" for 95% of the population.  When you're asking, "Does that word even exist?" having a hard time finding it anywhere, there's something clearly misconstrued.  This large print author, however, is more my style!  The puzzle clues are still curious, a sprinkling of difficult, but for the most part just enough mystery in each round, with little or no flipping to the answers.  I recommend the series, this being the first.  Large print with a spiral binder makes it a worthwhile investment.  I'm sticking with this author for the duration, gratefully!

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewTitle: Great! If you're from the right side of the Atlantic!
productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: A brilliant book of very large print clues on one page and a very large grid on the other. Absolutely perfect for my old mom who is struggling with AMD of late. Or it would be if she was American! Infuriatingly every single puzzle  has at least one clue that uses an American spelling or refers to U.S. pop culture. Mom is an 82 year old English lady who hasn't been further than Jersey! She couldn't have completed a single puzzle! Amazon, with books like this you need to specify whether it's in English or American English!
productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on September 20, 2015

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewTitle: I got what I ordered, no muss no fuss in short order

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: I thought my mom would like this, but be offended I was hinting at her age (which I was not) but she was delighted with this gift.  I figured it would make doing the crossword more pleasant being in larger format, and it is!  It's excellent quality and I like the spiral binding.  I might get one for myself!  A winner!
Great, easy to read. Spiral spine makes it easy to turn pages back. Love it!

raw_products.bookDescription: Treat yourself—or a loved one—to hours of relaxing, brain-boosting fun with this easy crossword puzzle book, designed especially for adults and seniors. With clear print, accessible clues, and satisfying challenges, it's the perfect way to stay mentally fit without the frustration.🌟 Inside This Book:🧩 90 Easy Crosswords – A delightful mix of straightforward and engaging puzzles, perfect for keeping the brain sharp.🔍 Large Print Clues & Grids – Designed with readability in mind—no eye strain, just smooth solving.✅ Answer Key Included – Find all the solutions conveniently located at the back of the book.📝 Boost Brainpower – Improve memory, increase focus, and expand your vocabulary while having fun.🎨 Premium Matte Cover – A classy finish makes this a lovely gift or addition to your bookshelf.🎁 A Thoughtful Gift for Puzzle LoversPerfect for parents, grandparents, or friends who enjoy a gentle challenge. Ideal for birthdays, holidays, or just to brighten someone’s day.☕ Great for Any Time of DayWhether it's your morning coffee, an afternoon break, or winding down at night, these puzzles fit right into your routine.✨ Ready to Begin?Give your brain the uplifting boost it deserves. Add this easy crossword puzzle book to your cart today and discover the joy of solving!📚 Click “Add to Cart” and enjoy 90 puzzles of pure mental satisfaction!

Provided in a large and easy-to-read size, this collection of more than 200 Brain Busters™ puzzles allows you to work through the challenges at your own pace. Satisfying, demanding, and ideal for all crossword enthusiasts. Makes a great gift for adults, seniors, or anyone who enjoys crosswords!
Collect more Sudoku, Large-Print puzzle, Crossword, Spot the Difference, and more books from Brain Busters and Parragon!
OVER 200 PUZZLES & SOLUTIONS: Hours of fun and entertainment to enjoy!
OVER 200 PUZZLES & SOLUTIONS: Hours of fun and entertainment to enjoy!

raw_products.bookDescription:
Boost Your Brain, Spark Nostalgia, and Relive the Glory Days!
Boost Your Brain, Spark Nostalgia, and Relive the Glory Days!Get ready to smile, reminisce, and challenge your mind with a one-of-a-kind crossword experience designed for adults and seniors who cherish the unforgettable decades of the 50s–90s!Created by professional crossword constructors and approved by cognitive experts, The Glory Days! is a celebration of memory, fun, and mental fitness. Every puzzle is a ticket back to the music, TV shows, movies, sports, and cultural milestones that shaped a generation.What’s Inside?50 Large-Print, Handcrafted Puzzles — Carefully designed for easy reading and solving without frustration, ranging from easy to medium difficulty.Decade-Specific Themes — Relive the magic of rock ‘n’ roll, Hollywood legends, iconic sports heroes, political moments, and pop culture trends that defined the 50s, 60s, 70s, 80s, and 90s.Trivia Tidbits with Every Puzzle — Fun facts and nostalgic moments to make you smile and spark forgotten memories. (Did you know the first email was sent in 1971?)No Crossword-ese! — Every clue uses real, familiar words—no obscure trickery—so you can relax, play, and enjoy.Expert Quality—Not AI Generated — Crafted in partnership with professional crossword creators, ensuring thoughtful wordplay and a genuinely fun experience.Large Print for Easy Solving — Senior-friendly design with big, clear fonts that make reading and solving a joy.Updated & Improved 2025 Edition — All crossword clues and answers have been fully reviewed to ensure a smooth, frustration-free solving experience.Plus, Get 3 FREE Bonus Gifts!The Baby Boomer Trivia Challenge — 72 nostalgic questions to spark conversations and test your memory.960 Easy to Hard Sudoku Puzzles — Printable puzzles for extra brain-boosting fun anytime.25 Must-Watch Classic Films List — Rediscover timeless movies that bring back priceless memories.The Perfect Nostalgic Gift for Puzzle LoversWhether you’re buying for yourself, your parents, or a dear friend, The Glory Days! is more than just a book—it’s a shared journey through laughter, memories, and connection.Pro Tip: Grab an extra copy and sit side by side with a loved one to solve, laugh, and relive the best decades together.Ready to Rewind the Clock and Boost Your Brain?Click "Add to Cart" now and step back into the Glory Days with hours of nostalgic, brain-boosting fun!

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Fun way to exercise your noggin
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I got this for my aunt who was born in the 1950s, and suffered from early onset dementia. She loved doing these crossword puzzles, and they were a hit at her care facility. If you or someone you care about is trying to give their brain some exercise and love nostalgia, I highly recommend this one. It's definitely targeted toward baby boomers, but I enjoyed pouring over it as a millennial as well.

raw_products.bookDescription: Are you looking for a fun and challenging way to exercise your brain? Look no further!This large print crossword puzzle book is packed with large print puzzles that will keep you entertained for hours. (these are true large print puzzles!)With easy-to-medium challenging large print crossword puzzles and a wide range of clues, this large print crossword puzzle book is the perfect choice for adults and seniors.Get it today, and start solving!FEATURES:✅ easy-to-medium crossword puzzles✅ large print clues✅ large grid boxes to enter letters✅ easy to read - reduce eye strain✅ hours of fun✅ solutions included✅ brain-boosting benefits✅ perfect gift idea for any adult in your life!Grab this large print crossword puzzle book as the perfect gift for any adult or senior in your life!Or get it for yourself and start solving....
